model_router.detail: Router uses provider DB + spec_db + benchmark_database.json. Benchmark score (15% weight) contributes to final_route_score. is_model_allowed blocks paid models. get_best_model returns benchmark_score + benchmark_evidence.

model_specialization_db.description: Model specialization database with 16 task categories
model_specialization_db.caveat: Re-scored from REAL signals (AA benchmark + callability + latency). 15/16 categories MEASURED_AA.
model_specialization_db.detail: 1088 models, 3264 INFERRED specialization scores. All scores are INFERRED, not measured. Router applies 0.05 penalty for missing evidence.

safety_contract.description: Safety contract validation for task execution

judge_v4.description: Judge v4 critic with 7 FAIL criteria

cloud_ai_direct.description: Direct cloud AI via model router (no Hermes sub-agents)
cloud_ai_direct.detail: Provider DB (16 providers, 1158 models) + spec_db (1088 models, 239 free) + benchmark DB (22 models DRY_RUN). Schema validated. Router uses it. Sub-agent uses router.

role_based_subagent.description: Role-based sub-agents using direct cloud models
role_based_subagent.caveat: Sub-agent orchestration/management not separate component, but routing is database-backed
role_based_subagent.detail: 5 sub-agent roles all route via database-backed router. Sub-agents get model_id, provider, benchmark_score, benchmark_evidence. No hardcoded model IDs.

massive_subagent_acceleration.caveat: Verified: 6/6 concurrent LLM subagents in 5.9s, failure isolation + retry/fallback.

longform_writing_1000plus.caveat: Verified: real chapter generation, continuity, resumable, parallel mode (4ch/82s); coherent quality; projects to 1000+ pages.

playwright_browser.caveat: Verified: ilma-chrome@lokah2150 active, CDP HeadlessChrome 147 responding on :9222.

model_benchmark_runner.caveat: Verified: latency_bench + callability_validator run in daily optimizer model_pipeline.
model_benchmark_runner.detail: 20 PASSIVE_PROVIDER_BENCHMARKED + 22 DRY_RUN_BENCHMARKED + 1116 NO_BENCHMARK. Router uses evidence-aware scoring.

search_pipeline.description: Search router and web search adapter

passive_benchmark_refresh_scheduler.detail: Cron installed at /etc/cron.d/ilma-passive-benchmark-refresh. Daily 03:00 WIB. Dry-run and validate-only modes pass.
passive_benchmark_refresh_scheduler.caveat: Live refresh blocked - OPENROUTER_API_KEY not present. Cached data used.

provider_intelligence_refresh.detail: OpenRouter metadata: 1158 models, 16 providers, cached. Live refresh when key available.

benchmark_source_refresh.detail: Artificial Analysis: 20 PASSIVE_PROVIDER_BENCHMARKED records, 9 days old, FRESH.
benchmark_source_refresh.caveat: Third-party benchmark, attribution required per AA terms.

provider_aware_router.detail: Router validated: 16-category routing, FREE_ONLY, main model unchanged.

subagent_cloud_routing.detail: Sub-agent route test: Planner/Research/Coding/Judge/CheapParallel all route via DB with FREE_ONLY.

nvidia_nim_coding_engine.note: Large models - may be slow or rate-limited
nvidia_nim_coding_engine.caveat: Verified: qwen3-coder-480b via NVIDIA NIM generated valid Python code.

research_grounded_writing.description: Research-grounded structured writing (paper/blog/book/novel) with citations, methodology, multi-format export
research_grounded_writing.implementation_path: ilma_scriptorium.py + ilma_research_engine.py(+tavily) + ilma_citation_manager.py + ilma_doc_exporter.py + ilma_writing_templates.py + ilma_project_registry.py
research_grounded_writing.caveat: Verified E2E: blog 11src/26claims/6sec/2249w -> MD+DOCX+PDF(7pg) with inline [n] citations + bibliography. Wired into ECC (WRITING task type) + runtime_wiring LAYER_3. Tavily primary search + relevance filter.

research_engine.description: Perplexica-style research engine: multi-source search/crawl + A/B/C source grading + claim->source binding -> research manifest
research_engine.caveat: Verified: 20 graded sources + 22 claims in 44s on live web.

citation_manager.description: Citation + bibliography manager (IEEE/APA/MLA/Chicago/links, per doc-type), claim->[n] binding

document_exporter.description: Markdown -> DOCX/PDF/HTML export with headings, figures, citations
document_exporter.caveat: Verified: DOCX/PDF/HTML/MD all generated (python-docx, reportlab, markdown installed).

project_registry.description: Global project metadata mapping + tidy storage (/root/project/external|internal/<slug>/), active-project tracking, status lifecycle
project_registry.caveat: Verified: creates structured project dirs, global registry, status transitions; integrated into Scriptorium.

perplexica_vane_research.description: Perplexica-Vane agentic web research (SearXNG + reason->search->synthesize) with free NVIDIA NIM models
perplexica_vane_research.implementation_path: ilma_vane_adapter.py + docker openclaw-vane-search:3030 (NVIDIA-NIM free + Transformers embeddings + SearXNG)
perplexica_vane_research.caveat: Verified: live agentic research, 755-char grounded answer via qwen3.5-397b free in 12s. Auto-mode detection (academic/discussions/deep). Fallback to Tavily research engine. Free-only.
